name: Favorite Peach Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 3 Medium peaches, peeled, pitted and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the cornstarch and sugar.
Stir in the evaporated milk and corn syrup.
2. Cook over medium heat until bubbly; cook for an additional minute.
3. Set aside to cool.
4. Finely chop the peaches using a blender or food processor with a metal blade.
5. Combine the chopped peaches, cooled milk mixture, and half-and-half.
6. Pour into an ice cream canister.
7. Freeze in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer's directions.
Makes about 1 quart.
Per Serving: 131 calories - 4 g protein - 26 g carbs - 2 g fat - 7 mg cholesterol - 143 mg calcium.
